description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and dist, and a before_script that exports MAKEFLAGS="-j$(mk/nproc.sh)" V=1 VERBOSE=1. Define a hidden .pages template using the image registry.gitlab.com/craigbarnes/dockerfiles/lua-testing that stores the public/ directory as an artifact (expire in 60 days), captures coverage with the regex '/^ *lines\.*: *(\d+\.\d+\%) .*$/', and runs git fetch --tags, make docs dist, and make coverage-report. Add a pages job that extends .pages, runs only on the master branch, and is placed in the dist stage to publish GitLab Pages. Add a pages:non-master job that also extends .pages, runs in the test stage, and is excluded from the master branch. Add a test:alpine job in the test stage using the image registry.gitlab.com/craigbarnes/dockerfiles/cdev-alpine that runs make vars, make build-all, make check-all, and make benchmark CFLAGS='-O3 -DNDEBUG'. Add a test:arch job in the test stage using the image registry.gitlab.com/craigbarnes/dockerfiles/lua-testing that runs make vars, make build-all, make check-all check-luajit, then for each Lua version 5.4,5.3,5.2,5.1 executes make clean-obj, luarocks --lua-version=<ver> --tree=/usr make gumbo-scm-1.rockspec, lua<ver> -e 'require "gumbo"', repeats clean-obj, and finally runs make benchmark CFLAGS='-O3 -DNDEBUG'.
